name: SHOE CARNIVAL INC
summary: Shoe Carnival, Inc. is one of the nation's largest omnichannel retailers of footwear and accessories for the family, operating 426 stores across 35 states and Puerto Rico under two banners: Shoe Carnival (282 stores) and Shoe Station (144 stores). The company sells branded footwear including Nike, Skechers, Crocs, adidas, Puma, HEYDUDE, HOKA, Birkenstock, Converse, and Brooks, targeting moderate-to-low-income families under Shoe Carnival and more affluent customers under Shoe Station, with e-commerce at shoecarnival.com and shoestation.com.

products.name: Shoe Carnival Banner
products.description: Value-oriented family footwear retail stores targeting moderate-to-low-income families with national name brands and promotional in-store experience.

products.name: Shoe Station Banner
products.description: Premium family footwear retail stores targeting more affluent customers with curated assortments and enhanced in-store experience.

products.name: E-commerce Platform
products.description: Online shopping channels at shoecarnival.com and shoestation.com supporting omnichannel sales.

products.name: Shoe Carnival Banner
products.description: Value-oriented family footwear retail stores targeting moderate-to-low-income customers across 31 states and Puerto Rico.

products.name: Shoe Station Banner
products.description: Premium family footwear retail stores targeting more affluent customers, operating across 19 states.

products.name: E-commerce Platforms
